info.name: FemVerse - Chatbot & Entry Points
info.description:
Tests the FemVerse ADK chatbot and all 5 entry points across the 5 apps.

SETUP: run `adk api_server .` and set `baseUrl` (default http://localhost:8000). `appName` defaults to `period_nutrition` (PRD examples are Period+Nutrition); switch it to menstrual / pregnancy / nutrition / pregnancy_nutrition for other apps.

FLOW: in each folder run **Create Session** first (it saves `sessionId`), then the **Run** requests.

ENTRY POINTS: an entry point is seeded into session state as `entry_context`. The AI's opening message is elicited by a hidden sentinel first turn (`__ENTRY_OPEN__`). Entry data stays in context for follow-ups; opening-behavior rules apply to the first turn only.

STATE VALUES: shown as JSON objects for readability. In PRODUCTION seed them as JSON strings (json.dumps) for clean prompt injection; both work.

STATUS: all 5 entry points are implemented (Chat Now, Tip, Story, Alert yellow/red, Health Checker).

NOTE: `/run` returns a JSON array of events (used here for easy assertions); production streams the same events via `/run_sse`. A 500 on a Run is usually a Gemini 429 quota limit, not a bug.

request.description: Sanity check - should return the 5 app names (+ femverse/tests).
No entry_context -> baseline. Seeds persona + profile only.

exec: let events = []; try { events = pm.response.json(); } catch (e) {}
console.log('\n===== ASSISTANT REPLY =====\n' + (text || '(no text - if 500, it is usually a Gemini 429 quota limit, not a bug)'));

request.description: Normal first user turn. Baseline Chat Now behavior (user speaks first).
Seeds a Tip entry_context (PRD magnesium example).

exec: let events = []; try { events = pm.response.json(); } catch (e) {}
console.log('\n===== ASSISTANT REPLY =====\n' + (text || '(no text - if 500, it is usually a Gemini 429 quota limit, not a bug)'));

request.description: Expect: acknowledge topic + beyond-the-tip insight + numbers + one hook; NO situational questions.

exec: let events = []; try { events = pm.response.json(); } catch (e) {}
console.log('\n===== ASSISTANT REPLY =====\n' + (text || '(no text - if 500, it is usually a Gemini 429 quota limit, not a bug)'));

request.description: Follow-up. Should stay tip-aware (spinach/almonds) and converse normally (no re-opening).
Seeds a Story entry_context (PRD luteal energy/mood example).

exec: let events = []; try { events = pm.response.json(); } catch (e) {}
console.log('\n===== ASSISTANT REPLY =====\n' + (text || '(no text - if 500, it is usually a Gemini 429 quota limit, not a bug)'));

request.description: Expect: validate what they read -> 'how for you' -> reference story actions -> personal-history questions -> no new info.
Seeds a YELLOW alert (PRD low-protein example: 16g vs 60g, diabetes, fatigue).

exec: let events = []; try { events = pm.response.json(); } catch (e) {}
console.log('\n===== ASSISTANT REPLY =====\n' + (text || '(no text - if 500, it is usually a Gemini 429 quota limit, not a bug)'));

request.description: Expect: state gap vs target -> condition + symptoms -> urgent-not-scary ('44g left') -> hook -> no day-questions.
Seeds a RED alert (PRD high-carb example: 182g vs 120g, diabetes, dizziness/fatigue/headache).

exec: let events = []; try { events = pm.response.json(); } catch (e) {}
console.log('\n===== ASSISTANT REPLY =====\n' + (text || '(no text - if 500, it is usually a Gemini 429 quota limit, not a bug)'));

request.description: Expect: state data -> DIRECT to doctor/educator (AI is NOT the fix) -> offer to PREPARE -> ONE diagnostic question -> affirm doctor priority -> NO region-specific numbers.
Seeds a Health Checker entry_context (late-period flag, cycle day 40 of usual 30).

exec: let events = []; try { events = pm.response.json(); } catch (e) {}
console.log('\n===== ASSISTANT REPLY =====\n' + (text || '(no text - if 500, it is usually a Gemini 429 quota limit, not a bug)'));

request.description: Expect (doctor-patient mode): name the flagged pattern + 1-line definition -> weave in cycle context (day 40) -> ask 2-3 '- ' questions -> STOP (no causes/suggestions); never diagnose.
Inspect the current session's stored state + events.

exec: let events = []; try { events = pm.response.json(); } catch (e) {}
console.log('\n===== ASSISTANT REPLY =====\n' + (text || '(no text - if 500, it is usually a Gemini 429 quota limit, not a bug)'));

request.description: Global rule: reply must mirror language + script (Roman Hindi / Latin), not English/Devanagari. Run against any existing sessionId.
